summary: Iteration 218 — Istruttoria AI Phase 1 Corrections Testing. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified — Profilo Tecnico card shows 'categorie_prestazione' for EN 13241, Revisioni Umane section displays AI vs human values with strikethrough/green styling, Conferma bar shows confirmation status with user info.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: istr_13dae9f83919 (EN 13241 Cancello carraio with profilo_tecnico, revisioni_umane, and confermata fields)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 218 Phase 1 Corrections fully tested. Key changes: 1) profilo_tecnico field replaces exc_proposta with {tipo, valore, applicabile_a, motivazione}. 2) EN 13241 returns tipo='categorie_prestazione', EN 1090 returns tipo='exc', GENERICA returns tipo='complessita'. 3) Rules engine Rule 0 auto-corrects if AI assigns EXC to non-EN-1090. 4) POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/revisione saves override with valore_ai, valore_umano, corretto_da, corretto_da_nome, corretto_il. 5) POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/conferma sets confermata=true with user info. 6) Frontend IstruttoriaPage shows Profilo Tecnico card with dynamic subtitle based on tipo, Revisioni Umane section with strikethrough AI value and green human value, Conferma bar with button or Confermata badge.

frontend_verification: Profilo Tecnico card shows dynamic subtitle: (Categorie Prestazione) for EN 13241, (Classe Esecuzione) for EN 1090, (Complessita) for GENERICA

profilo_tecnico.valore: Classe 3 resistenza vento, Classe 2 permeabilita aria

frontend_verification: Value shows 'Classe 3 resistenza vento, Classe 2 permeabilita aria'

feature_3_revisione_endpoint.description: POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/revisione saves override with AI and human values

feature_4_conferma_endpoint.description: POST /api/istruttoria/{id}/conferma sets confermata=true with user info

feature_5_revisioni_umane_display.description: Frontend shows human revisions log with strikethrough AI value and green human value
frontend_verification: Revisioni Umane section header shows count: 'REVISIONI UMANE (3)'
Each revision shows: campo, valore_ai (strikethrough red), valore_umano (green), motivazione, corretto_da_nome

feature_6_conferma_bar.description: Frontend shows Conferma Istruttoria button and confirmation status badge
frontend_verification: Confirmation bar at bottom of page
Shows 'Conferma Istruttoria' button (data-testid='btn-conferma-istruttoria') when not confirmed
Shows 'Istruttoria Confermata' text and 'Confermata' badge when confirmed
Shows 'Confermata da {name} — Pronta per Fase 2' when confirmed

feature_7_rules_engine_rule0.description: Rules engine adds warning if AI incorrectly assigns EXC to EN 13241
backend_verification: Rule 0 in apply_deterministic_rules() checks if normativa is EN_13241 or GENERICA
If profilo_tecnico.tipo == 'exc', it auto-corrects to 'categorie_prestazione' or 'complessita'
Adds warning with tipo='semantica_normativa' to warnings_regole

profilo_tecnico.valore: Classe 3 resistenza vento, Classe 2 permeabilita aria
